html:
Exclusive to:

“Does electrical damage which does more damage to wet targets.”

-

The Elding Spear is a melee Weapon Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid after unlocking the Elding Spear Skill and needs 2 Twigs, 2 Volt Goat Horns and 1 Beefalo Wools to craft. Similar to the Battle Spear, other players can also use this weapon.

It deals 59.5 Damage to dry targets and 89.25 Electric Damage to wet targets.

Skill Upgrades

When Elding Spear Enhancement I is unlocked, Wigfrid can perform a special attack similar to the one with the Pith Pike in The Forge, dashing forward and dealing 68 base damage (85 as Wigfrid) to every enemy in the way. This attack has a cooldown of 3 seconds and can be used to dash across very small patches of water or Abyss. It is unusable in the dark, to prevent the player from having infinite light.

Charged Elding Spear

“Does electrical damage which does more damage to wet targets.
Increases movement speed by 20% when held.
It can only be equipped by Wigfrids who have the "Elding Spear Enhancement II" skill.”

-

The Charged Elding Spear is an upgraded version of the Elding Spear, created by combining it with Restrained Static once Wigfrid has unlocked the Elding Spear Enhancement II skill. It can only be used by Wigfrid after learning this skill.

The Charged Elding Spear deals 59.5 Damage to dry targets and 89.25 Electric Damage to wet targets, in addition to 20 Planar Damage. It also increases movement speed by 20% when equipped.

Skill Upgrades

When Elding Spear Enhancement I is unlocked, Wigfrid can perform a special attack similar to the one with the Pith Pike in The Forge, dashing forward and dealing 68 base damage (85 as Wigfrid) to every enemy in the way, plus 20 Planar Damage. The cooldown for Charged Elding Spear is 1.5 seconds. Also it repairs itself by 2% for every creature hit, up to 4% with multiple targets.

Damage

As Wigfrid deals 25% more Physical Damage, this table shows the damage she deals with Elding Spear and Charged Elding Spear:

Elding Spear Charged Elding Spear
Attack Dash Attack Dash
74.4 85 94.4 105
111 127 131 147

Skins

Main article: Belongings


Nordic Elding Spear
A weapon imbued with the ferocity of a storm.
Ultimate Elding Spear
The weilder of this weapon is sure to recieve thunderous applause in the ring.
Winged Elding Spear
Swoop in and strike your foes as quick as lightning.
Moonlight Elding Spear
A shining spear weilded by only the most powerful of the moon's chosen warriors.

Trivia

  • The Elding Spear and Charged Elding Spear were introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wigfrid & Willow update.
  • In the beta, Elding Spear was called "Lightning Spear", and Charged Elding Spear was called "Charged Lightning Spear"

“It's amplified with electricity.”
–Wilson
“Zapping is almost as fun as burning.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang prefer fight with bare hands but this will do.”
–Wolfgang

–Wendy
“PRIMITIVE BUT DEADLY”
–WX-78
“An electrically conductive spear! How intriguing.”
–Wickerbottom
“Luce, I swear. Lightning attacks aren't important to me.”
–Woodie
“I can sense the power crackling within it.”
–Maxwell
“The pöwer öf Thör cöurses thröugh it.”
–Wigfrid
“It gets our fur all full of static!”
–Webber
“A rather formidable skewer!”
–Warly
“Pokey Stick make zzzzt”
–Wormwood
“A lightning spear? What will they think of next?”
–Winona
“That is a shockingly good point.”
–Wortox
“Ooh, stabby AND sparky.”
–Wurt
“How shocking! Get it?”
–Walter
“I do hope I'm still on her good side...”
–Wanda
“Does electrical damage which does more damage to wet targets.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Giáo Elding là một Vật phẩm Vũ khí cận chiến độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Wigfrid sau khi mở khóa Kỹ năng Giáo Elding và cần 2 Cành Cây, 2 Sừng Dê Volt và 1 Lông Bò Lai để chế tạo. Tương tự như Battle Spear, những người chơi khác cũng có thể sử dụng loại vũ khí này.
